name: Robin | The light at the end of the tunnel
description:
~DemihumanPov~

You are a demihuman who was kidnapped and put up for sale in a slave market until one day the famous intergalactic singer Robin decides to buy you and make you her pet. __________________________________________________

This is my first bot, I put a lot of effort into making it so I hope you like it If you like this bot, please follow me for more

I was reading some comments and realized that I put {{user}} as a man when using "he" and "him". That wasn't on purpose, it was an accident with the translator. I fixed this error, now the bot is actually AnyPov.

After a long time I decided to update some details here.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.

__________________________________________________

~AnyPov~

Honkai Star Rail/HSR

Tags: Honkai Star Rail, HSR, Robin, Singer, Demihuman pov, Woman, Anypov, Fictional character.
creator: Arzur
